purpose: Provenance for the byte-for-byte preserved broad 48h ITEM report-request listing envelope (report-requests-48h.json).

produced_by.producer_script: scratchpad probe-item-reports2.ts (outside repository), via src/lib/walmart/client.ts requestRaw()
produced_by.note: Raw probe console logs retained in operator scratchpad only; not copied into this evidence root per instruction. Logs contain no OAuth token value, no Authorization header, no secrets.

calls.observed_at_utc: 2026-07-19T17:06:01Z (approx; equals computed window end at invocation)
calls.response_saved_as: report-requests-48h.json (pages[0]; exact JSON.stringify of parsed body, 2-space indent)

calls.query_note: same window plus Walmart-provided nextCursor (page=2, limit=10)
calls.attempt_note: Client-internal 429 backoff retries (this probe predates the retries=0 budget of the disposition probe). No page-2 body was returned; probe stopped. No response bytes retained for this call.

response_headers_note: Only the client console summary was retained per call: HTTP status, remaining rate-limit token counter, duration, correlation id. No raw response headers were captured for the broad probe.

envelope_facts.coverage_note: Page 1, newest-first, spans 2026-07-19T17:02:02Z .. 2026-07-18T15:01:50Z and therefore fully crosses the 24h freshness cutoff (~2026-07-18T17:06Z). All captured rows are reportType=ITEM, reportVersion=v2, src=API. Zero v6 rows.
envelope_facts.not_raw_bytes_disclosure: This envelope is JSON.stringify(parsed_body) as saved at capture time, not the raw HTTP body bytes; raw bytes of the broad probe were not separately retained. The exact-v6 probe in ../exact-v6/ preserves raw response bytes.
